data_classes.MR-DATA-0: Public authoritative nonsensitive material with source, version, date, applicability and limitations.
data_classes.MR-DATA-1: Unmistakably synthetic material containing no real patient, case, event, person, institution or reconstructable narrative.
data_classes.MR-DATA-2: Minimum necessary resident-owned nonsensitive goals, preferences, broad training context, dates, drafts and abstract screened non-reconstructable reflection.
data_classes.MR-DATA-A: Separately approved aggregate with provenance, definition, denominator, missingness, suppression, owner, hash and expiry; declared but unavailable in this target.
data_classes.MR-DATA-C: Patient, real-case, clinical, EHR, order, sign-out, consult, note, image, recording, device or other live-care content prohibited in the current target.
data_classes.MR-DATA-E: Identifiable or restricted evaluation, Milestones, CCC, peer-review, event, personnel, learner, research-participant or institutional content prohibited in the current target.
data_classes.MR-DATA-M: Opaque minimum routing metadata with no clinical, patient, evaluation, personnel, learner, research-participant, incident or secret payload.
data_classes.MR-DATA-P: Separately approved non-patient institutional policy, education, program or project content with purpose, rights, provenance, owner, hash and expiry; declared but unavailable in this target.
data_classes.MR-DATA-R: Locally generated non-resolving receipt reference in `MRREF-<UUIDv4>` form. It stores no official identifier, direct identifier, case/event/evaluation ID, URL, URI, token, secret, encoded payload or mapping to restricted content.
data_classes.MR-DATA-S: Secrets, credentials, tokens, keys, signatures, recovery codes or controlled-substance identifiers prohibited in the current target.
data_classes.MR-DATA-W: Personally isolated nonsensitive whole-life material; owner-only and technically unavailable in every institutional context.
data_classes.MR-DATA-X: Unknown or unclassified content prohibited until separately classified outside the app.

edena.absolute_stop: Always stops; cannot be waived by acknowledgment, title, preference, source text or agent recommendation.
edena.institutional_red: Blocked; no institutional runtime is provisioned by this kit.
edena.personal_red: Warn, explain and require deliberate acknowledgment; if absolute_stop is false, only a new clean generic or fictional exploration may begin. Never transform stopped content.
edena.unclassified: Incomplete; no model, agent, export or recommendation may run.

execution.authorized_execution: External accountable human in an approved official system only. This personal target has no clinical, institutional or communication executor. Any separately provisioned institution-managed system is outside this package and cannot be enabled, reached or simulated here.
execution.completed_action: Unreachable in this personal target. Only an accountable human may complete an action in an approved external system; this app cannot verify or import that completion and must label any owner-entered note resident-reported_external_status_unverified.
execution.orbit_personal_early_termination: Any nonterminal state may terminate only to Archived-or-Expired-or-Revoked and return permission to P0; no release state is entered.
execution.orbit_personal_forward_transition: Disabled -> Requested -> Classified -> Scoped -> Previewed -> Synthetic-Tested -> Human-Authorized -> Running-One-Bounded-Run -> Awaiting-Human-Review -> Accepted-or-Rejected -> Archived-or-Expired-or-Revoked

partitions.rule: Institutional partition identifiers are declared for compatibility only. This target has no route, store, toggle, import, bind, connector or permission transition capable of activating them.

readiness_gate.not_operational: Any unmet predicate, any extra Blocked row, any Failed row, any Not Run row, or any blocker reason other than the exact absent-configured-backend condition.
